features.description: CRUD for Registro Trabajador (worker registration per unidad operativa)
steps: POST /api/hr/worker-registry/registros with {trabajador_dni: existing DNI, proveedor_ruc: existing RUC, fecha_ingreso: '2024-01-15'} — verify 201
GET /api/hr/worker-registry/registros/{id} — verify detail includes empty comportamiento_historico array

features.description: Filter registros by estatus and sub_grupo
CRUD for Comportamiento Historico (employment history as child records)
steps: POST another with {cargo: 'SUPERVISOR', salario: 4500, fecha_inicio: '2024-07-01'} — verify 201

features.description: EDT Tareo read-only listing with filter
steps: Verify each item has: edt_id, tareo_id, horas

features.description: Registro Trabajador list page with aero-data-grid
steps: Verify page-layout with title 'Registro de Trabajadores'
Verify grid columns: trabajador_dni, proveedor_ruc, fecha_ingreso, fecha_cese, estatus (badge), sub_grupo
Verify filter bar: estatus, sub_grupo, search by DNI

features.description: Registro form with worker lookup by DNI
steps: Enter DNI in search field — verify auto-lookup from trabajador table
Verify auto-filled fields: nombre, apellido from trabajador

features.description: Registro detail shows employment history timeline
steps: Verify entity-detail-shell layout with worker info header
Columns: cargo, salario, fecha_inicio, fecha_fin, numero_contrato
Verify 'Agregar Historial' button to add new entry
Add entry — verify appears in timeline

features.description: Backend tests for registro trabajador pass
